items: Do not use hammers, impact wrenches, etc. to remove or install wheel bolts.
Do not damage the threads of the wheel bolts.

blocks.text: Remove the screw (B) from the splash guard (A) and shift the splash guard toward the front. Use a slim offset screwdriver (ANEX 6102-T) or equivalent (C) to remove the splash guard screw.

items: When installing the splash guard, the screw must be replaced with a service bolt.

blocks.text: Turn the knob (E) of the adjusting bolt (D) so that the angle between the wheel bolt (A) and the jaws (C) of the ball joint remover (B) remains vertical, repeat the adjustment, and remove the wheel bolt from the hub (F).
Align the wheel bolt (A) with the notch (B) in the splash guard and the notch (C) in the knuckle and remove.

Turn the knob (E) of the adjusting bolt (D) so that the angle between the wheel bolt (A) and the jaws (C) of the ball joint remover (B) remains vertical, repeat the adjustment, and remove the wheel bolt from the hub (F).

items: Clean the contact surfaces of the wheel bolts and hubs to be replaced.
Wheel bolts must be degreased before installation.
Do not use hammers, impact wrenches, etc. to remove or install wheel bolts.
Do not damage the threads of the wheel bolts.

blocks.text: Align the new wheel bolts (A) with the notch (B) in the splash guard and the notch (C) in the knuckle.

Temporarily attach the new wheel bolt (A) to the hub (B), insert several washers (P/N 94101-12800) (C) to the dimensions shown in the figure, and lightly tighten the nut (P/N 90304-SC2-000) (D). Tighten the nut below the torque limit until there is no clearance (F) between the hub and wheel bolt. Wheel Bolt Tightening Torque: 0.5 to 1.0 Nm (0.02 to 1.0 in.) Torque limit value 108N-m (11.0kgf-m) or less

items: Wheel bolts shall be inserted perpendicular to the hub surface by aligning the hub and wheel bolt splines (E).
Nuts and washers used as jigs shall not be mounted on the car body.

items.text: Wheel bolts shall be inserted perpendicular to the hub surface by aligning the hub and wheel bolt splines (E).

items: After tightening, check again that there is no clearance between the hub and wheel bolt.

blocks.text: Replace the removed splash guard screw with the service bolt (A) and tighten to the specified torque. Refer to the parts catalog for the part numbers of the service bolts.

items: Confirm that the tightening torque of the wheel reaches the specified value.
If the wheel tightening torque does not reach the specified value, the wheel bolt may be spinning in the hub, Replacing the hubs as an assembly.

Torque limit value 108N-m (11.0kgf-m) or less

Confirm that the tightening torque of the wheel reaches the specified value.
If the wheel tightening torque does not reach the specified value, the wheel bolt may be spinning in the hub, The hub bearing unit shall be replaced as an assembly.
